visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with round glasses and a blue patterned flat cap speaks directly to the camera. He is wearing a grey marl t-shirt and gesturing with his hands. The background is a simple, out-of-focus indoor setting with grey vertical curtains. (2) The scene transitions to include colorful graphic overlays and cartoon text bubbles. The man remains on screen, sometimes centered and sometimes moved into a circular frame to make room for text listing legal conditions for passport renewal. (3) A series of screen recordings showing a government website interface follow. The cursor moves to highlight various buttons like 'Login' and 'Upload Photo'. These screens are interspersed with small circular insets of the main character continuing his explanation. (4) An animated sequence features three anthropomorphic animal characters—a dog, a pink bird, and a cat—sitting in a classroom environment. They interact with a floating document, representing the renewed passport. The video ends with a close-up graphic of a Republic of China passport and an ID card being handed over.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c 有意思 Tim 哥. [Slogan]: 護照過期. [Variety]: 傻傻出門排隊嗎?. (2) [Slogan]: 從 2025 年開始. [Variety]: 可以線上申換. (3) [Subtitle]: 首先你必須符合三個條件. [Subtitle]: 1. 有戶籍國民護照換發. [Subtitle]: 2. 護照已經過期了. [Subtitle]: 3. 換發護照的時候不變更個人資料. [Variety]: 就是跟舊護照是一樣的. (4) [Slogan]: 線上就可以申請新護照喔!. [Slogan]: 自然人憑證. [Slogan]: 行動自然人憑證. [Slogan]: 輸入你的 email 取得驗證碼. [Slogan]: 選擇領照地點. [Slogan]: 填寫個人資料以及上傳照片. [Slogan]: 電子簽章. [Slogan]: 最後繳交費用 NT.1300 元. (5) [Slogan]: 完成後收據會寄到你的 email. [Slogan]: 並且附上領照的時間跟地點.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey t-shirt, a blue patterned flat cap, and round-framed glasses. He has a friendly and engaging demeanor.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a home studio with soft grey curtains. Transitions to digital government website interfaces and finally to a cartoon-style classroom illustration.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An enthusiastic male voice with a clear, professional tone introduces the concept of online passport renewal over a bright, synthesized pop track with a strong 4-on-the-floor beat. (2) Each time a text requirement appears on screen, a sharp 'pop' or 'ding' sound effect triggers, marking the technical transition. The music maintains a constant high energy. (3) As the digital tutorial begins, subtle 'click' SFX mimic the navigation of the web interface. The narrator's speech rate remains high but articulate. (4) The audio concludes with a cheerful, high-valence wrap-up sentence. The music ends with a quick fade-out immediately following the final vocal articulation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Rule Explanation -> Step-by-Step Procedure -> Final CTA/Outcome.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform and guide the audience through the new online passport renewal process launched in 2025, emphasizing convenience over traditional in-person queues.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical high-retention educational short video using rapid cuts and information-dense overlays to keep viewers engaged while providing practical utility.
